root_cause_assessment: Playwright Python package is installed but managed browser bundle is absent.
Installing Playwright browsers requires outbound DNS/network access to Playwright CDN, which failed with EAI_AGAIN.

System Chromium exists but cannot complete screenshots in this sandbox; stderr shows missing DBus, netlink permission denial, inotify proc read failure, and crashpad socket errors, followed by timeout.
WeasyPrint render proxy remains the working local fallback for static HTML visual evidence.
recommended_next_actions: For ChatGPT sandbox: retain WeasyPrint/static/VPQ replay path and mark browser screenshot replay as opportunistic, not required, unless browser can be proven working in that turn.
For PC/Termux/CI: install Playwright browsers and dependencies outside the sandbox and run a portability replay there.
Add a BrowserRenderCapabilityResolver cartridge so future stages auto-detect browser capability and route to chromium, playwright, or render-proxy without hanging.
